titulo: Vídeo 56: Revisão da Semana 8 e Final do Módulo 2

cenas.dalle_prompt: A grand montage showcasing all the advanced tricks from the past weeks: a dog walking backwards, "dancing" on two legs, jumping through a hoop, and barking on command. Epic, celebratory music. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Fast-paced, exciting cuts that feel like a trailer for a dog talent competition, showing the high level of skill achieved.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A checklist infographic for Week 8: "Andar para Trás", "Andar em Duas Patas", "Pular no Colo", "Pular por um Arco", "Ficar em Pé", "Falar". Each item gets a platinum star. 8k detail.
cenas.grok_movement: Each platinum star animates in with a premium, shining effect, signifying the completion of the advanced module.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A shot of a certificate of completion for "AdaptaCão - Nível Intermediário". The dog has its paw print on the signature line. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera slowly pans across the certificate, focusing on the details and the cute paw print signature.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Close-up on a calendar showing all of Módulo 2 (Weeks 5-8) being stamped with a "NÍVEL INTERMEDIÁRIO CONCLUÍDO" graphic. 8k detail.
cenas.grok_movement: The stamp animates onto the calendar with a satisfying, official-looking thud.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final screen with text "MÓDULO 2 COMPLETO! Você é um Treinador de Elite!", with a preview of the final module "Próximo Nível: Maestria e Polimento Final", building excitement for the grand finale. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A graphic of a trophy or a gold medal appears. The preview for the final module slides in with a dramatic, epic transition.
